topic: Feature Catalog + Testing Playbook Verification Slice

findingDetails.title: Catalog master still says feature annotations cover every source file while the feature leaf says coverage is partial
findingDetails.evidence: The master catalog says every source file declares a Feature catalog annotation, but the dedicated feature file says coverage is a measured majority and only partial at .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/feature_catalog/16--tooling-and-scripts/214-feature-catalog-code-references.md:26.
findingDetails.recommendation: Align the master catalog with the partial-coverage contract and refresh the measured count from a checked script.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared the master feature catalog, the dedicated feature leaf, and sampled source/header coverage under the named review scope.

findingDetails.title: The MCP tool count is split between 37 in catalog/tests and 36 in README/tests
findingDetails.evidence: The catalog says the server exposes 37 tools and claims the README matches, but the skill README still advertises a 36-tool API at .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/README.md:45 and .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/README.md:256. The live schema list spans 37 entries in .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tool-schemas.ts:681 and .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tool-schemas.ts:725, while one test expects 36 at .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tests/review-fixes.vitest.ts:117.
findingDetails.recommendation: Pick `TOOL_DEFINITIONS.length` as canonical, update README references, and reconcile the stale test expectation.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Cross-checked catalog prose, README prose, schema registry, and two tests that encode different tool counts.

focus: D2 Security - unsafe playbook execution or secret/path exposure

findingDetails.title: The root playbook release gate expects 380 scenario files, but the current tree has 384
findingDetails.evidence: The root says the playbook contains 380 scenario files and the deterministic check exits unless the count is 380 at .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/manual_testing_playbook/manual_testing_playbook.md:166. Running that same glob in the current tree counts 384 files, with category 24 present in the root at .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/manual_testing_playbook/manual_testing_playbook.md:41 and listing scenarios 401-415 at .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/manual_testing_playbook/24--local-llm-query-intelligence/README.md:60.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update the release-readiness count/check to the current package shape or narrow the glob so README/category files are not counted as scenarios.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Executed the exact root glob and broke the count down by playbook category.

findingDetails.title: Five playbook scenarios link to catalog files that do not exist at their referenced paths
findingDetails.evidence: Broken catalog links were found at .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/manual_testing_playbook/02--mutation/019-feature-09-direct-manual-scenario-per-memory-history-log.md:55, .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/manual_testing_playbook/01--retrieval/006-hybrid-search-pipeline.md:60, .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/manual_testing_playbook/01--retrieval/007-4-stage-pipeline-architecture.md:57, .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/manual_testing_playbook/14--stress-testing/170-run-stress-cycle.md:146, and .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/manual_testing_playbook/04--maintenance/036-startup-runtime-compatibility-guards.md:59.
findingDetails.recommendation: Rewrite those links to the current catalog file names/locations and add a link-integrity check to the playbook validation path.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Resolved every markdown link from playbook feature files that points into ../../feature_catalog and checked target existence.

findingDetails.title: Scenario 136's feature file has a malformed validation contract for annotation-name validity
findingDetails.evidence: The per-scenario file has a broken real-user-request string and command fragment at lines 18-21, including dangling `sort -u` text and `feature_catalog/FEATURE_CATALOG.md`, while the root scenario uses the lowercase `feature_catalog/feature_catalog.md` command at .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/manual_testing_playbook/manual_testing_playbook.md:2692.
findingDetails.recommendation: Regenerate scenario 136 from the root contract so the command sequence is executable and path casing is portable.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared the root scenario entry against the dedicated per-scenario file and checked catalog root path behavior.

results.summary: The slice's required catalog/playbook coverage audit found release-gate count drift, broken catalog links, and a malformed validation scenario.
No checklist.md exists in this Level 1 review slice; requirement evidence was evaluated through spec.md and iteration artifacts.
Catalog code-reference claims are present but inconsistent about completeness.
Representative grep traceability passes, but several playbook validation surfaces drift.

focus: D4 Maintainability - stale source paths and operator maintainability

findingDetails.title: The local-LLM catalog category points at stale implementation paths for shared embeddings and drift handlers
findingDetails.evidence: The category lists `mcp_server/shared/embeddings/*` and `mcp_server/handlers/memory-drift-why.ts` at lines 40-45, but the live embedding factory is under .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/shared/embeddings/factory.ts:1 and `memory_drift_why` is implemented/exported in .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/handlers/causal-graph.ts:28 and .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/handlers/causal-graph.ts:468.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update the category source table to the actual shared embedding package and consolidated causal-graph handler paths.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Resolved source table paths in the sampled feature catalog category against the live repository tree and handler exports.

focus: Stabilization replay - re-check highest-risk findings and search for P0/P1 escalation

results.summary: Representative grep scenario for known features returned handler plus lib/shared hits; no escalation to P0.
Scenario 136 remains malformed, but the underlying annotation names matched catalog H3 headings when run against the lowercase root file.

focus: Final saturation pass - broad no-new-finding confirmation
